citation: Law No. 8/1999 on Consumer Protection — Article 8
summary: Product efficacy and performance claims must be truthful and must not mislead about quality or results.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Efficacy percentages, guaranteed results, or performance stats. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation or qualify claim. CHECK: Test method, sample, and applicable product variant. ESCALATE IF: Absolute guarantee or fabricated test results.
